The ceiling isn't a generous estimate of the venture's market; it's a measurement of the thing eating the venture's market. # Data Center Power Distribution Units and Power Supply Units Market to Reach $73,376.5 Million by 2035

08 Sep 2025

---

## What is Data Center Power Distribution Units and Power Supply Units and Why Does It Matter?

Data center power distribution units (PDUs) and power supply units (PSUs) are critical components of modern data center infrastructure.

• PDUs manage and distribute electrical power from the utility or UPS systems to servers and networking devices, ensuring uptime and efficient load management. Advanced versions—intelligent or metered PDUs enable real-time monitoring, remote control, and optimization of energy consumption.• PSUs convert and regulate electricity for IT hardware, including AC/DC and DC/DC converters, voltage regulator modules (VRMs), and hot-swap modules, ensuring reliable delivery of power to servers and storage systems.

They matter because the rapid growth of cloud services, AI-driven workloads, and hyperscale data centers demands highly efficient, scalable, and sustainable power delivery systems. Without robust PDUs and PSUs, maintaining energy efficiency, uptime, and cost-effectiveness would be impossible.

According to BIS Research, data center power distribution units and power supply units market was valued at $9,101.8 million in 2024 and expected to reach $73,376.5 million by 2035 at a CAGR of 21.09%.

### OVERVIEW

Source: Secondary Research, Interviews with Experts, MarketsandMarkets Analysis

The OCP rack market is projected to grow from USD 2.02 billion in 2026 to USD 4.32 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 21.0%. The OCP rack market is experiencing strong growth, driven by the rapid expansion of hyperscale data centers and AI workloads. The shift towards 21-inch OCP racks from 19-inch racks is gaining momentum because 21-inch racks are capable of handling power density better while having enhanced cooling solutions and airflow design. With the increasing demand for artificial intelligence, high-performance computing, and liquid cooling solutions, there is an increased adoption of OCP racks with a power-handling capacity of up to 100 kW. Efficiency, saving on costs, and standardization are critical factors that fuel the growth in the market since OCP racks enable the design of standardized IT infrastructures.
